title: pelargonium × glaciale
intro: Pelargonium × glaciale, commonly known as Mountain Rose, is a hybrid species of flowering plant within the Geraniaceae family, derived from the natural crossing of Pelargonium capitatum and possibly another species. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × glaciale include alleviating cold and flu symptoms, reducing inflammation, and soothing digestive issues, among others. It is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its numerous health benefits.
